[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
opt-level = 3

# Enable AVX-512 for the distance module
[target.x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu]
rustflags = ["-C", "target-cpu=native"]

params.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
rayon = "1.10"
arc-swap = "1.7"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
opt-level = 3
